company_description: Cohesity is an AI-powered data security and management company offering a unified platform for data protection, cyber resilience, and AI-ready data insights across hybrid cloud, on-premises, and SaaS environments.

products.name: Cohesity Data Cloud
products.description: A single, secure platform that protects 1,000+ hybrid cloud and SaaS workloads, integrates threat detection, automates cyber recovery, and unlocks AI-ready data insights across cloud, on-prem, and SaaS environments.

products.name: Cohesity DataProtect
products.description: Enterprise backup and recovery solution that protects physical, virtual, cloud, and SaaS workloads with 18x faster backups and instant mass VM recovery capabilities.

products.name: Cohesity DataHawk
products.description: AI-powered data security service that provides threat intelligence, ransomware detection, data classification, and cyber vaulting to strengthen cyber resilience.

products.name: Cohesity FortKnox
products.description: SaaS-delivered cyber vaulting solution that stores an isolated, immutable copy of data off-site to enable rapid recovery from ransomware and other cyberattacks.

products.name: Cohesity DataGovern
products.description: SaaS-based data security governance service that discovers, classifies, and monitors sensitive data across enterprise environments to reduce compliance risk.

products.name: Cohesity Gaia
products.description: LEARN AI — AI-powered conversational assistant that enables users to query enterprise backup data using natural language to quickly surface insights and information.

products.name: Cohesity SmartFiles
products.description: Software-defined file and object storage solution that consolidates unstructured data silos, reduces storage costs, and integrates with the Cohesity Data Cloud platform.

products.name: Cohesity SiteContinuity
products.description: Orchestrated disaster recovery solution that automates failover and failback workflows to minimize downtime and meet recovery time objectives across hybrid environments.

products.name: Cohesity CloudSpin
products.description: Enables organizations to spin up workloads directly in public clouds (AWS, Azure, GCP) from Cohesity backups for disaster recovery and cloud migration use cases.

products.name: Cohesity CloudArchive
products.description: Tiered cloud archival solution that moves cold backup data to low-cost cloud storage (AWS S3, Azure Blob, GCP) while maintaining searchability and recoverability.

products.name: Cohesity Helios
products.description: SaaS-based global management plane that provides a single pane of glass for monitoring, managing, and operating all Cohesity clusters and cloud deployments.

products.name: Cohesity Data Security Alliance
products.description: An integrated partner ecosystem connecting Cohesity's data platform with leading security vendors (CrowdStrike, Palo Alto, Splunk, etc.) for unified threat detection and response.

products.name: Cohesity ITDR (Identity Threat Detection & Response)
products.description: Identity threat detection and response capability integrated into the Cohesity platform to detect and respond to identity-based attacks targeting backup infrastructure.

products.name: Cohesity Marketplace (Apps)
products.description: An integrated marketplace allowing third-party and custom applications to run natively on the Cohesity Data Cloud platform alongside protected data.

products.name: Cohesity Academy
products.description: Cohesity's official training and certification program offering instructor-led, self-paced, and lab-based courses covering data protection, security, and AI-ready data management.

competitive_products.competitive_context: Veeam is a leading backup and recovery competitor offering broad workload coverage and a large partner ecosystem.
Rubrik is Cohesity's closest direct competitor, offering a similar converged data protection and security platform with cyber resilience focus.
Commvault competes with Cohesity in enterprise backup, recovery, and data management across hybrid cloud environments.
Dell's PowerProtect portfolio competes with Cohesity in enterprise data protection and cyber recovery.
Veritas NetBackup is a legacy enterprise backup competitor that Cohesity frequently displaces in modernization deals.
Zerto (HPE) competes with Cohesity SiteContinuity in continuous data protection and disaster recovery orchestration.

partnership_signals.ilt_vilt: Cohesity Academy offers ILT via regularly scheduled virtual classes and dedicated on-site team training with hands-on labs

If we went back in time, we’d make the same decision." We expect Gaia to reduce the burden on our lawyers by helping them find and evaluate information in minutes, not the hours or days it takes today.” Manufacturing Conagra "My relationship with Cohesity—it still feels like a small company. Having that relationship with the leadership team is important. Knowing that you can help influence the direction is something that doesn’t happen with every organization I work with." See al

page_contents.atp_page: Cohesity Academy | Cohesity Loading Cohesity Academy Build your future in AI-powered data security and management. Explore Customer Catalog Explore Partner Catalog Interested in Classroom Training? We have opportunties all year across regions! Learn more Accelerate your career Whether you’d like to improve your organization’s agility or advance your personal career, our expertly designed courses and certifications put you on the fast track. Deepen your knowledge of AI-ready data, optimized multicloud compatibility, cyber resilience, enterprise data security, and multicloud data management with our world-class training and certifications. Get Academy details GET CERTIFICATION DETAILS Explore our courses and certifications View courses How training is delivered Instructor-Led Training Instructor-Led Training provides students with an opportunity to engage with our expert instructors and their peers. Sessions include hands-on labs and exercises to help solidify data management and security knowledge. Delivered through regularly scheduled virtual classes. Learn more Dedicated Team Training Private dedicated group training offers hands-on labs and exercises, with demos and activities tailored specifically to the customer's environment. Delivered through virtual sessions, at customer site, or at corporate offices. Learn more Free Self-Paced eCourses Complimentary for all Cohesity customers, free online self-directed courses provide flexible and on-demand access, available 24/7. Every Cohesity Academy learning journey begins with the Platform Foundations eCourse. Learn more Self-Paced eCourses with Labs Self-Paced eCourses with Labs is online, lab-centric training with six months of access to a modular lab environment, activities, and guides. Students follow step-by-step activities to administer, configure, and manage Cohesity products. Learn more Certifications Industry-recognized certifications allow individuals to authenticate, validate, and share their skills. Cohesity Certifications help boost professional productivity and increase confidence with Cohesity products. Learn more Our five learner journeys Are you interested in becoming Cohesity Certified but unsure which courses to pursue? Explore the resources below to identify the training paths that will help you achieve your Cohesity certification goals. page_contents.product_page_1: Cloud Data Security and Management Platform | Cohesity Data Cloud Loading Join the Cohesity Community Connect with peers, share expertise, build skills, and enhance your product knowledge in the new Cohesity Community. Learn more The Cohesity Data Cloud: Secure, AI-ready data platform Protect, secure, and gain insights into your enterprise data, no matter where it lives. Watch the video Read the solution brief Overview Editions Product portfolio Testimonials Resources Watch a demo Free trial Menu Overview Editions Product portfolio Testimonials Resources Watch a demo Free trial Overview Where cyber resilience meets the AI-ready enterprise One unified platform for data protection, security, and AI—built to strengthen cyber resilience and unlock the value of your data. Protection is the foundation Protect 1,000+ hybrid cloud and SaaS workloads. Security integrated at the data layer Strengthen threat detection, automate cyber recovery, and reduce compliance risk. Secure AI at enterprise scale Improve AI outcomes with secure, trustworthy, AI-ready enterprise data. Optimize data management costs Reduce TCO as much as 70% and yearly maintenance costs by 50% Outcomes 13,000+ customers rely on us for their cyber resilience Security Built-in zero-trust principles and AI-powered threat detection, and immutability. Smart Improve your AI outcomes with protected enterprise data Speed 18x faster backups, 2x faster restores, recover 1000 VMs instantly Savings 50% lower TCO to secure and manage your data--for organizations of all sizes, across all industries. Scale Some of the largest data protection estates run on Cohesity Simplicity One platform, one interface for managing all data, any workload, anywhere One platform.
